findings.description: Job Purnell married Emma (Emm) on 27 October 1844 in Norwich, New London County, Connecticut.

details.place: Norwich, New London, Connecticut, United States

supporting_sources: "Connecticut, Vital Records, Prior to 1850", FamilySearch, entry for Job Purnal and Richard Livesey, 27 October 1844 (marriage of Job Purnal, officiated by Richard Livesey).
"Connecticut, Vital Records, Prior to 1850", FamilySearch, entry for Emma Osborne and Richard Livesey, 27 October 1844 (bride's record for the same marriage).

findings.description: Job Purnell's wife Emma's maiden name was Osborne — she appears as Emma Osborne in the 1844 Connecticut marriage record.
supporting_sources: "Connecticut, Vital Records, Prior to 1850", FamilySearch, entry for Emma Osborne and Richard Livesey, 27 October 1844.
Daughter recorded as Sarah Osborne Purnell, carrying the mother's maiden name as a middle name.
